category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a VPN adapter using Tor or I2P; official GitHub About says OnionCat is the VPN adapter for Tor and I2P at https://github.com/rahra/onioncat.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use OnionCat at https://github.com/rahra/onioncat; source_facts.name is onioncat.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/rahra/onioncat documents usage, options, examples, and the OnionCat VPN adapter behavior.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rahra/onioncat, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub About topics list security, ipv6, tor, vpn, anonymity, i2p, network-security, and vpn-adapter at https://github.com/rahra/onioncat.
